issues.sample: I PURCHASED THIS 2014 PATRIOT FOUR WEEKS AGO WITH, I HAVE NOT EVEN MADE A FIRST PAYMENT. YESTERDAY WHILE DRIVING IN A PARKING LOT MY JEEP LOST ALL POWER. I WAS SHIFTED INTO DRIVE AND WOULD HIT THE GAS PEDAL AND NOTHING WOULD HAPPEN. THERE WAS ABSOLUTELY NO WARNING THAT IS WAS GOI

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 JEEP PATRIOT. THE CONTACT STATED  WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 35 MPH, A COMMERCIAL TRACTOR TRAILER CRASHED INTO HIS DRIVERS SIDE FRONT FENDER. THE AIG BAG SENSORS DID NOT DEPLOY. THE VEHICLE WAS DESTROYED. THE VEHICLE WAS TOWED TO HIS INSURANCE COMPANY

OUR SEAT BELT LIGHT STARTED TO MESS UP IN JUNE 2015, WE TOOK IT TO THE SERVICE DEPARTMENT AND AFTER THEY TRIED TWO SWITCHES I WAS TOLD THAT IT COULD NOT BE FIXED AND THAT ALL 2014 JEEP PATRIOTS DO THIS! IF YOU PULL THE SEAT BELT OUT AN INCH FROM HOME POSITION THE LIGHT GOES OFF,

I PURCHASED THIS 2014 PATRIOT FOUR WEEKS AGO WITH, I HAVE NOT EVEN MADE A FIRST PAYMENT. YESTERDAY WHILE DRIVING IN A PARKING LOT MY JEEP LOST ALL POWER. I WAS SHIFTED INTO DRIVE AND WOULD HIT THE GAS PEDAL AND NOTHING WOULD HAPPEN. THERE WAS ABSOLUTELY NO WARNING THAT IS WAS GOI

ON WELL TRAVELED MINING ROADS IN 4WD, WHEN ONE TIRE SLIPS, THE VEHICLE WOULD NOT EVEN PULL ITS OWN WEIGHT AND THE ENGINE WOULD NOT REV OVER 2,000 RPM. I BACK UP, PUT THE VEHICLE IN 4X4 LOW AND IF ANY WHEEL SLIPS, IT WOULD STOP AT 2,000 RPM AGAIN.  ALL I CAN DO IS BACK DOWN A DANG

narrative.headline: What 2014 Jeep Patriot owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine problems are the most-reported concern, with owners describing sudden total power loss while driving. Air bag non-deployment in crashes and persistent seat belt warning light malfunctions account for a large share of remaining complaints. Electrical faults are also reported, sometimes coinciding with the power-loss events described in engine complaints.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle losing all power while driving, with the accelerator pedal producing no response when pressed. · 2 fire · 3 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 JEEP PATRIOT. THE CONTACT STATED  WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 35 MPH, A COMMERCIAL TRACTOR TRAILER CRASHED INTO HIS DRIVERS SIDE FRONT FENDER. THE AIG BAG SENSORS DID NOT DEPLOY. THE VEHICLE WAS DESTROYED. THE VEHICLE WAS TOWED TO HIS INSURANCE COMPANY
issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: Owners report that air bag sensors failed to deploy the air bags during collisions. · 20 crash · 23 injured

issues.title: Seat Belts
issues.blurb: Owners report a seat belt warning light that malfunctions and cannot be repaired, with dealers acknowledging the defect is common across the model. · 1 fire · 8 crash · 9 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden complete loss of electrical power while the vehicle is in motion, leaving the vehicle unresponsive to driver inputs. · 4 fire · 4 crash · 1 injured
